name: project-structure
observations: Monorepo managed with Turborepo
Apps located in /apps directory (web-app-1 through web-app-4, 3d-portfolio, award-winning-website)
Shared packages in /packages (ui, present, dashcraft, tailwind-config, eslint-config, typescript-config)
Custom MCP tools in /tools directory (20+ tools)
Legacy app in /legacy-app directory (plain JS)

name: tech-stack
observations: React + Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
Redux for state management
shadcn/ui for component library base
pnpm as package manager
Vitest for testing
Storybook for component stories

name: component-patterns
observations: Components in packages/ui/components/{Name}/{Name}.tsx
Each component has index.ts barrel export
Types in separate types.ts file when needed
Tests use Vitest with .test.ts extension
Stories use Storybook with .stories.tsx extension

name: mcp-tools
observations: component-factory: generates React components from shadcn/ui templates
memory: stores project context across sessions (this tool)
Multiple custom tools in /tools directory
Tools built with TypeScript and compiled to /build directories

name: review-and-fix-workflow
observations: Production-grade review→fix→review pipeline for React components
component-reviewer MCP tool analyzes TypeScript, React patterns, accessibility, performance, security, code quality, testing

component-fixer MCP tool applies fixes based on review JSON: type-safety (any→unknown, !→?.), accessibility (alt, aria-label, role, tabIndex), performance (inline functions/objects), code-quality (console.log removal, magic numbers), security (hardcoded secrets, innerHTML)
review-and-fix CLI chains both: review → fix → re-review with score delta
CLI usage: node tools/cli-wrappers/build/review-and-fix-cli.js packages/ui/components/ComponentName
Stdin usage: component-reviewer path | review-and-fix --stdin
FixEngine class handles line-based transformations with 4 fixTypes: remove, replace, add, refactor
Fixer accepts reviewJson parameter for pre-computed review results

name: Storybook Story Patterns
observations: Stories should include all component variants with proper args
Use argTypes with control: 'select' for variant/size options
Include interactive stories like AllVariants, AllSizes for visual comparison
For compound components (Dialog, Select, Tooltip), use render() with full composition
Import sub-components explicitly for proper autodocs generation
Use TooltipProvider wrapper for Tooltip stories
Include edge cases: disabled states, loading states, fallback states

name: UI Components Review Results
observations: 11 components scanned, average score 66/100
Main issues: incomplete stories, missing accessibility tests, TypeScript errors
Fixed stories for: Button, Badge, Avatar, Dialog, Select, Tooltip
PostCSS config added to packages/ui for Tailwind v4 support
Storybook main.ts updated to read stories from components/ directory
Storybook preview.ts updated to import Tailwind styles

name: UI Components Story Enhancement Complete
observations: Enhanced stories for 24 components in @repo/ui

Components enhanced: Button, Badge, Avatar, Dialog, Select, Tooltip, Card, Accordion, Alert, Checkbox, Table, DropdownMenu, HoverCard, Popover, Progress, Skeleton, Sheet, Tabs, Separator, Drawer, RadioGroup, Switch, Slider, Textarea
Each component now has comprehensive stories with: Default state, All variants, Edge cases (disabled, loading), Realistic usage examples, Proper args and controls
Fixed Storybook Tailwind v4 integration by adding postcss.config.js and importing styles in preview.ts
Fixed Storybook stories path to read from components/ directory
All stories use proper composition patterns for compound components
Input already had decent stories so was not modified
